global.title: Survey Sunday: what will it take for fleets to realize electric works – TODAY?
global.summary: For the last few weeks, we’ve been running a sidebar survey about what Electrek readers think it would take to convince the most EV-resistant fleet operators to realize that electric vehicles are ready for work TODAY. After receiving 1,700 responses, here’s what you told us. more…

global.title: E-quipment highlight: 25-ton LiuGong 870HE electric wheel loader
global.summary: Chinese equipment brand LiuGong is putting its 25-ton 870HE electric wheel loader to work at a STRABAG quarry in Slovenia, proving that electric vehicles can get the job done without the sky-high fuel costs associated with fossil fuels. more…

global.title: Here are the best electric bikes you can buy at every price level in June 2026
global.summary: I’ve spent countless hours here at Electrek doing detailed hands-on testing of hundreds of electric bikes. Through thousands of miles of riding, I’ve been fortunate to learn these e-bikes inside and out, top to bottom and front to back. That long-term experience with real-world e-bike testing has he

global.title: New Danfoss hydraulic pump increases equipment runtime by 50%
global.summary: Danish engineering and powertrain experts Danfoss have developed a new digital hydraulic system designed specifically for electric construction equipment that can reduce energy consumption from the machine’s battery by 35%, and improve runtime by more than 50%. (!) more…

global.title: When public charging stations aren’t so public, and why it matters
global.summary: Drivers opening an EV charging app for the first time today will be presented with thousands of so-called “public” chargers at local car dealers. Once they arrive, however, the store’s customers, store hours, security gates, and Wild West pricing can turn what should be a routine charging stop into

global.title: Harbinger gears up for war with autonomous military truck program
global.summary: Commercial truck startup Harbinger is partnering with the robotics experts at American Rheinmetall to develop an uncrewed military ground vehicle based on the company’s medium duty hybrid and electric truck chassis. more…

global.title: All the new EVs you can buy with 0% financing in June 2026
global.summary: Lease deals get all the hype, but a lot of people would still rather buy their vehicles. If that sounds like you, you’re in luck, because there’s a whole bunch of great EVs you can buy with 0% financing this month – including the best-selling Tesla Model Y! more…

global.title: Carvana’s bet on Slate is ACTUALLY a bet on itself, as the future of automotive retail
global.summary: As new electric vehicle brands like Scout and Slate search for alternatives to franchise auto dealers, America’s largest online auto retailer is quietly positioning itself to become the future of automotive retail. more…

global.title: Wallbox deploys its first Supernova PowerRing DC fast chargers
global.summary: Wallbox just installed its first public Supernova PowerRing DC fast chargers at Port de Sitges, a busy marina on Spain’s Mediterranean coast near Barcelona. more…

global.title: T1 Energy buys KORE Power to cash in on the AI power boom
global.summary: T1 Energy, formerly known as FREYR Battery, is buying battery storage and software company KORE Power in a deal aimed at growing its presence in the fast-expanding energy storage and AI data center markets. more…
